title: Breaking Down the 2026 WBC by Salary
excerpt: Venezuela won its first-ever World Baseball Classic title in 2026, beating the heavily-favored USA 3-2 in the final. The Americans had nearly $350M in combined AAV — the most expensive roster in tournament history. So how did Venezuela pull it off with $120M less in payroll?
